patch.value: Read-only audit of pm-cli observability stack (2026-06-07). Covers src/core/telemetry/, src/core/diagnostics/, src/core/sentry/, and pm health / pm validate / pm stats / pm telemetry commands. Identifies genuine forward gaps; creates actionable, non-duplicate tracking items under pm-5oj5.

value.author: audit-observability-agent
value.text:
AUDIT FINDINGS (2026-06-07)

Scope audited:
- src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts (1765 lines) — queue, flush, sanitize, schema, OTEL export
- src/core/telemetry/observability.ts — command taxonomy, error code inference, resolution derivation
- src/core/telemetry/consent.ts — first-run prompt, opt-out
- src/core/diagnostics/remediation.ts — remediation registry (37 entries)
- src/core/sentry/instrument.ts + helpers.ts — initialization, scrubbing, expected-error filtering
- src/cli/commands/health.ts (1571 lines), validate.ts, telemetry.ts, stats.ts

KEY OBSERVATIONS (live):
- pm health --json: all 9 checks ok:true; 72-entry queue, last_successful_flush current
- pm telemetry stats: max_attempts=8 on some entries — approaching retry exhaustion with no warning
- TELEMETRY_SCHEMA_VERSION=1 hardcoded; server probe reads max_schema_version header but never warns if server > client
- source_context covers user/automation/test/dogfood/audit_smoke but PM_AUTHOR identity is lost in the 'automation' bucket
- KNOWN_NOISY_CONSOLE_MESSAGE_PATTERNS has 8 patterns but no governance cap/test
- extension_update_health_partial_coverage warning has no remediation_map entry
- No locks health check; only pm gc --scope locks provides stale-lock visibility
- telemetry stats reports count+max_attempts but no duration_ms percentiles or error_rate
- Sentry tracesSampleRate=0.2 hardcoded (no env-var override)
- 9 telemetry env-vars scattered across code, not documented in one place

ALREADY TRACKED/CLOSED (not duplicated):
- pm-t4wb: schema versioning prep (CLOSED — client_schema_version in queue, server max-version header read)
- pm-5oj5 epic children: remediation map, validate fix-hints, local-analytics subcommand, capture_level doc

ITEMS CREATED: pm-dfhp, pm-xo1n, pm-fbyu, pm-bdvm, pm-3n3b, pm-irc7, pm-jxls, pm-gsoe, pm-r7md, pm-gg8e
